header: Gerente de Excelência Comercial — Sanofi Medley

lesson.menu_desc: Where I Started: Simple Past with Regular Verbs -- 27 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 6 -- My Career Story -- Simple Past (Regular Verbs)
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Gleice Leonardo Rocha de Souza | Aula 6 -- My Career Story

listenings.text: Hi, I am Marcos, and this is my career story. I started my first job in 2009 in a small office. I studied at night and worked during the day, so my weeks were very busy. In 2012 I joined a pharmaceutical company as a junior analyst. Two years later, I moved to another city for a better position, and my family supported the change. I worked hard and learned a lot from my team. Last year I applied for a manager role, and I earned a promotion. My career started small, but step by step it grew. The lesson I learned is simple: every big career started with one first job.

Hello, my name is Sandra, and I want to share my career path. I graduated from university in 2010 with a degree in chemistry. After that, I started as an intern in a laboratory. I really liked the work, so I stayed and studied more. In 2014 I joined a bigger company and moved to a new department. I changed teams twice, and each change taught me something new. Three years ago I applied for a leadership position. I prepared well, and I earned the promotion. Today I lead a small team, and I love my job. My advice is this: be patient, because a good career needs time.

extra_audio.text: She finished school and started her first job. Then she studied at night to learn more. After that, she joined a bigger company. She moved to a new city for the role. Finally, she applied for a promotion and earned it.
